title: search_application.search

name.description: The name of the search application to be searched.

typed_keys.description: Determines whether aggregation names are prefixed by their respective types in the response.

params.description: Query parameters specific to this request, which will override any defaults specified in the template.

description:
Run a search application search.

Generate and run an Elasticsearch query that uses the specified query parameteter and the search template associated with the search application or default template.
Unspecified template parameters are assigned their default values if applicable.
